subject: fix(a11y): add min-h-[44px] to WorkspaceForm inputs for mobile touch targets
body:
Workspace name and currency label inputs were missing the 44px minimum
height that all other form inputs in the app have. This ensures adequate
touch targets on mobile per Apple HIG and WCAG 2.5.5.

Tags: a11y, ux, mobile
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: patch

title: add min-h-[44px] to WorkspaceForm inputs for mobile touch targets
